summary: Fixed two issues: (1) added `if (itemId)` guard so `setProjectItemStatus` is only called when `addToProject` succeeds, preventing spurious gh API calls on partial failure; (2) updated `readApprovalState` to log a warning on JSON parse failure instead of silently returning null, distinguishing a corrupted file from a missing one. Updated the corresponding test to use a call-count spy verifying `setProjectItemStatus` is NOT called when `addToProject` returns null.
